user_prompt: The graviton pylon requires a startup
prayer:
Approach the graviton pylon with reverence, intoning the Canticle of Gravitic Awakening.
Anoint its crystalline matrices with sacred oils to rouse the dormant Machine Spirit within the graviton pylon.
Initiate the startup rites by channeling noospheric commands, beseeching the Omnissiah for field coherence.
Verify harmonic resonance through auspex incantations as the graviton pylon hums to life.
Seal the startup with the Benediction of Stability upon its pylons.

user_prompt: Bless the iron halo for calibration
prayer:
Present thyself before the iron halo, reciting the Litany of Protective Aegis.
Employ mechadendrites to adjust its emitter arrays for precise calibration.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the iron halo, anointing coils with blessed lubricants.
Chant binaric calibration hymns whilst aligning warp-repellent fields to the Omnissiah's will.
Affirm the iron halo's sanctified calibration through halo diagnostic runes.

Grasp the servo-arm in sanctified gauntlets, whispering the Oath of Servitude.
Anoint its hydraulic pistons and motivators to awaken the embedded Machine Spirit.
Commence activation protocols with noospheric linkages, invoking the Omnissiah's ingenuity.
Test the servo-arm's dexterity through ritual grasping motions.
Conclude activation by etching electro-consecration sigils upon its frame.

user_prompt: Guide me through sicarian infiltrator a targeting
prayer:

Calibrate its auspex lenses and vox-relays with sacred calibration fluids.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the sicarian infiltrator via the Rite of Hunter's Gaze.
Initiate targeting subroutines, aligning threat vectors under Omnissiah's unerring sight.
Verify lock-ons through simulated fire-runes etched in binary cant.

user_prompt: My melta bomb is ready for operation
prayer:
Handle the melta bomb with reverence, intoning the Incantation of Thermic Fury.
Inspect its plasma conduits and detonators, anointing for flawless operation.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the melta bomb to ensure destructive purity.
Prime for operation by synchronizing chrono-timers to the Omnissiah's rhythm.
Seal with the Benediction of Annihilation upon its warhead.

user_prompt: Critical: icarus array requires a reset
prayer:
Approach the icarus array humbly, chanting the Canticle of Aerie Rebirth.
Purge erroneous data-slates from its avionic cogitators to prepare for reset.
Initiate reset sequences with mechadendrite interfaces, beseeching the Machine Spirit's forgiveness.
Realign seeker protocols under the Omnissiah's watchful gaze as the icarus array renews.
Confirm reset integrity through ascension diagnostic litanies.

Encircle the micro-servitor with cooling cants, invoking thermal equilibrium.
Apply cryo-unguents to its overheating vents and heat-sinks.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the micro-servitor for cooling respite from the Omnissiah.
Cycle coolant runes through its circulation manifolds during the rite.
Attest to stabilized thermals with auspex blessings upon the micro-servitor.

prayer:
Examine the krak grenade's casings with pious scrutiny, reciting maintenance doxologies.
Cleanse detonator mechanisms and shaped charges with sanctified abrasives.
Anoint the krak grenade's fuse core to placate its volatile Machine Spirit.
Perform maintenance alignments, ensuring warhead integrity for the Omnissiah's wrath.
Consecrate the krak grenade anew with electro-incantations.

Link noospheric tendrils to the micro-servitor, intoning synchronization harmonies.
Harmonize its servo-motors and cogitator nodes with binary catechisms.
Awaken the Machine Spirit of the micro-servitor for perfect synchronization.
Initiate data-stream mergers under the Omnissiah's divine algorithm.
Verify synchronization through unified response diagnostics.

user_prompt: How do I bless the power armour for operation?
prayer:
Don the power armour piece by piece, chanting the Hymn of Indomitable Shell.
Anoint servos, plates, and power cells to rouse the armour's Machine Spirit.
Initiate operation cycles with vox-acknowledgements to the Omnissiah.
Test motive functions and field generators in ritual exertion.
Bless the power armour fully for operation with the Seal of Mars.
